commentary_text: The model favors Spain at 48%, while sportsbooks favor France at 38%, a 16-percentage-point gap on the France win probability. Polymarket prices align closely with sportsbook consensus. The gap could reflect recent lineup news, injury developments, or form shifts that the model has not yet incorporated into its Elo-based estimates. The dashboard surfaces this substantial divergence as a signal for monitoring rather than an indication of which source is more reliable.
